title: Bridges over navigable waters authorized
doc_html:
PART III.  STATE BRIDGES

§941.  Bridges over navigable waters authorized

The department of highways may construct bridges and approaches thereto over navigable waters, for public use, on or connecting highways in this state.  Thereafter, the department may operate and maintain these bridges.
doc_text:
PART III.  STATE BRIDGES
§941.  Bridges over navigable waters authorized
The department of highways may construct bridges and approaches thereto over navigable waters, for public use, on or connecting highways in this state.  Thereafter, the department may operate and maintain these bridges.
